nodes.title: Get Vouchers List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with optional query type=receipt|payment|transfer. Returns array of vouchers for business ordered by createdAt desc. Requires Authorization header and bizId membership. Returns 200 with [{id, voucherType, voucherNumber, amount, fromAccountId, toAccountId, categoryId, status, description, voucherDate, createdAt, createdBy}]. Returns 401 if unauthorized. Returns 403 if not member of business.

nodes.title: Post Voucher Create Receipt
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with body {voucherType: 'receipt', amount, toAccountId, fromAccountId, categoryId, description, voucherDate}. Validates amount > 0 and accounts belong to business. Generates sequential voucherNumber. Creates voucher record and journal entry lines (debit toAccount, credit fromAccount). Updates account balances. Returns 201 with created voucher {id, voucherNumber, ...}. Returns 400 if amount invalid or accounts missing. Returns 403 if accounts not in business. Requires vouchers create permission.

nodes.title: Post Voucher Create Payment
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with body {voucherType: 'payment', amount, toAccountId, fromAccountId, categoryId, description, voucherDate}. Same validation as receipt. Debits fromAccountId and credits toAccountId. Creates voucher and journal lines. Updates balances. Returns 201 with voucher. Returns 400 if validation fails. Requires vouchers create permission.

nodes.title: Post Voucher Create Transfer
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with body {voucherType: 'transfer', amount, toAccountId, fromAccountId, description, voucherDate}. Transfers amount between two accounts within same business. Creates voucher and journal lines. Returns 201 with voucher. Returns 400 if validation fails.

nodes.title: Post Voucher Reverse
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/reverse with optional body {reverseDate, note}. Creates reversing voucher with opposite journal entries. Original voucher status updated to 'reversed'. Balances adjusted back. Returns 200 with reversed voucher {id, voucherNumber, isReversed: true, originalVoucherId}. Returns 404 if voucher not found. Returns 400 if already reversed or invalid state. Requires vouchers reverse permission.

nodes.title: Delete Voucher
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id. Validates ownership. Deletes voucher and related journal lines. Reverses balance changes. Returns 200 with {success: true}. Returns 404 if not found. Returns 400 if voucher already posted or reversed (cannot delete). Requires vouchers delete permission.

nodes.title: Get Voucher Transitions
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:voucherId/transitions. Returns array of available workflow transitions for voucher based on current status and operation type. Returns 200 with [{id, fromStatus, toStatus, label, requiresApproval}]. Empty array if no transitions available. Used for workflow state machine.

nodes.title: Post Execute Transition
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:voucherId/transition with body {transitionId, note}. Executes workflow transition. Updates voucher status. Logs transition in workflow_history. Returns 200 with updated voucher and new status. Returns 404 if voucher or transition not found. Returns 400 if transition not allowed from current status. Requires workflow execute permission.
